description: MeshMetric enables collection and export of service mesh metrics. It configures sidecar and application metrics scraping, allows customization of which metrics are published, and supports exporting to Prometheus or OpenTelemetry backends for monitoring and observability.

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: Spec is the specification of the Kuma MeshMetric resource.

applications.description:
Applications is a list of applications that Dataplane Proxy will scrape.
Ignored on zone-proxy-only Dataplanes (zone ingress/egress exist without a co-located workload).

address.description: Address on which an application listens.

name.description: Name of the application to scrape

path.description: Path on which an application expose HTTP endpoint with metrics.

port.description: Port on which an application expose HTTP endpoint with metrics.

backends.description: Backends list that will be used to collect metrics.

backendRef.description:
BackendRef is a reference to a MeshOpenTelemetryBackend resource that
defines the collector endpoint. Mutually exclusive with Endpoint.

labels.description:
Labels to match the referenced resource. When multiple resources match,
the oldest by creation time wins.

endpoint.description:
Endpoint for OpenTelemetry collector.

Deprecated: use BackendRef instead.

refreshInterval.description: RefreshInterval defines how frequent metrics should be pushed to collector

clientId.description: ClientId of the Prometheus backend. Needed when using MADS for DP discovery.

path.description: Path on which a dataplane should expose HTTP endpoint with Prometheus metrics.

port.description: Port on which a dataplane should expose HTTP endpoint with Prometheus metrics.

tls.description: Configuration of TLS for prometheus listener.

mode.description: Configuration of TLS for Prometheus listener.

type.description: Type of the backend that will be used to collect metrics. At the moment only Prometheus backend is available.

includeUnused.description:
IncludeUnused if false will scrape only metrics that has been by sidecar (counters incremented
at least once, gauges changed at least once, and histograms added to at
least once). If true will scrape all metrics (even the ones with zeros).
If not specified then the default value is false.

profiles.description: Profiles allows to customize which metrics are published.

appendProfiles.description: AppendProfiles allows to combine the metrics from multiple predefined profiles.

name.description: Name of the predefined profile, one of: all, basic, none

exclude.description:
Exclude makes it possible to exclude groups of metrics from a resulting profile.
Exclude is subordinate to Include.

match.description: Match is the value used to match using particular Type

type.description: Type defined the type of selector, one of: prefix, regex, exact

include.description:
Include makes it possible to include additional metrics in a selected profiles.
Include takes precedence over Exclude.

match.description: Match is the value used to match using particular Type

type.description: Type defined the type of selector, one of: prefix, regex, exact

targetRef.description:
TargetRef is a reference to the resource the policy takes an effect on.
The resource could be either a real store object or virtual resource
defined in-place.

labels.description:
Labels are used to select group of MeshServices that match labels. Either Labels or
Name and Namespace can be used.

mesh.description: Mesh is reserved for future use to identify cross mesh resources.

name.description:
Name of the referenced resource. Can only be used with kinds: `MeshService`,
`MeshServiceSubset` and `MeshGatewayRoute`

namespace.description:
Namespace specifies the namespace of target resource. If empty only resources in policy namespace
will be targeted.

proxyTypes.description:
ProxyTypes specifies the data plane types that are subject to the policy. When not specified,
all data plane types are targeted by the policy.

sectionName.description:
SectionName is used to target specific section of resource.
For example, you can target port from MeshService.ports[] by its name. Only traffic to this port will be affected.

tags.description:
Tags used to select a subset of proxies by tags. Can only be used with kinds
`MeshSubset` and `MeshServiceSubset`

status.description: Status is the current status of the Kuma MeshMetric resource.

message.description:
message is a human readable message indicating details about the transition.
This may be an empty string.

reason.description:
reason contains a programmatic identifier indicating the reason for the condition's last transition.
Producers of specific condition types may define expected values and meanings for this field,
and whether the values are considered a guaranteed API.
The value should be a CamelCase string.
This field may not be empty.

status.description: status of the condition, one of True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase.
